# Vendored frontend dependencies

These files are checked in so the admin UI works offline and without third-party CDNs.

| File | Upstream | License |
|------|----------|---------|
| `vue.min.js` | Vue 2.6.14 | MIT — see [LICENSES.md](LICENSES.md) |
| `httpVueLoader.min.js` | http-vue-loader 1.4.2 | MIT — see [LICENSES.md](LICENSES.md) |

Full copyright notices, source URLs, and license text: **[LICENSES.md](LICENSES.md)**.

To refresh pinned versions, download new builds from npm and re-run `bash scripts/smoke_test.sh`.
